title: Inventory recovery branch commits
description: Enumerate every commit unique to c-tx-clock-hardening, interop-fail-closed, lost-recovery-2, node-feature-recovery, oscore-recovery, python-radio-failure, rust-prefix-model, and rust-rpl-recovery. Map commits to Beads, changed paths, dependencies, duplicate patch IDs, and conflicts; classify integrate, superseded, drop, or blocked with rationale.
acceptance_criteria: A durable Beads note records every unique commit hash exactly once with branch, subject, disposition, rationale, dependency order, and conflict hotspots; no commit is silently omitted.
notes: Completed five-way independent inventory. 59 unique commits recorded exactly once in branch-sized comments. Fixed dispositions: drop inaccurate 2869 docs; block unsound whole d156 fleet commit; supersede two prefix commits; integrate RPL baseline sequence and isolated hardening; conditionally gate signed-link, SCHC migrations, and fail-closed CI on independent validation; reconcile secure.rs/schema/lockfile conflicts explicitly.
close_reason: All 59 unique branch commits inventoried with durable dispositions and conflict/gate rationale
